MU.title: $6.2 Billion in 30 Days: How Sandisk, Micron And Seagate Powered One Of The Fastest ETF Launches Ever

macro_events.event_summary: An opinion/analysis piece warns that the S&P 500's AI-driven rally has reached a rare technical extreme seen only 3 times before, suggesting elevated risk of a pullback.
primary_drivers: Technical overextension / mean reversion risk in AI-concentrated index
Sentiment/positioning crowding in AI megacap leaders
headlines: The S&P 500 Just Did Something It’s Only Done 3 Times Before. Why Trump’s AI Rally Is in Danger
